perturbation.original_text: Included Monthly Services System Administration Management of SMTP, IMAP, DNS, SQL database and HTTP server software and systems for the AstroNutrition.com domain and web site. This includes regular off-site backups of the website itself and the database. Change Management Management of site source code and integration of contributed software updates and bug fixes into zencart is included. Personal Technical Support 24 x 7 emergency phone support and 1-business-day email response on non-critical issues. Includes a 99 percent server uptime guarantee.
perturbation.changed_text: Included Monthly Services System Administration Management of SMTP, IMAP, DNS, SQL database and HTTP server software and systems for the AstroNutrition.com domain and web site. This includes regular off-site backups of the website itself, but the database backups are only performed quarterly. Change Management Management of site source code and integration of contributed software updates and bug fixes into zencart is included. Personal Technical Support 24 x 7 emergency phone support and 1-business-day email response on non-critical issues. Includes a 99 percent server uptime guarantee.
perturbation.explanation: The change from 'regular off-site backups of the website itself and the database' to 'regular off-site backups of the website itself, but the database backups are only performed quarterly' introduces a contradiction. The term 'regular' is generally understood to mean frequent and consistent. By explicitly stating that database backups are only quarterly, while website backups remain 'regular', the term 'regular' becomes ambiguous and contradictory in its application to the entire backup process. This introduces uncertainty regarding the frequency and reliability of the database backups, which is a critical component of the service.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Included Monthly Services System Administration Management of SMTP, IMAP, DNS, SQL database and HTTP server software and systems for the AstroNutrition.com domain and web site. This includes regular off-site backups of the website itself, but the database backups are only performed quarterly. Change Management Management of site source code and integration of contributed software updates and bug fixes into zencart is included. Personal Technical Support 24 x 7 emergency phone support and 1-business-day email response on non-critical issues. Includes a 99 percent server uptime guarantee.
perturbation.justification: The original text implies regular backups for both the website and the database. The changed text specifies 'regular' backups for the website but only 'quarterly' backups for the database. This creates an in-text contradiction because the initial expectation of 'regular' backups for both is directly contradicted by the explicit 'quarterly' specification for the database. This ambiguity regarding backup frequency, especially for the database, makes the term 'regular' contradictory. The fact that the contradicted text and changed text are in the same location further solidifies this contradiction, aligning with the 'Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction' definition.

perturbation.original_text: Terms of Agreement Managed hosting fees are $175 per month for a period of 12 months. This includes up to 10 G of bandwidth, with overages at $20 for each 1 G beyond 10 in any given month.
perturbation.changed_text: Terms of Agreement Managed hosting fees are $175 per month for a period of 12 months. This includes up to 10 G of bandwidth, with overages at $20 for each 1 G beyond 10 in any given month. However, during the months of November and December, the bandwidth allowance is reduced to 5G.
perturbation.explanation: The addition of 'However, during the months of November and December, the bandwidth allowance is reduced to 5G' creates a contradiction to the initial statement that 'This includes up to 10 G of bandwidth'. This introduces a contradiction because the allowance amount is inconsistent and dependent on the time of year. It creates uncertainty regarding the bandwidth terms.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Terms of Agreement Managed hosting fees are $175 per month for a period of 12 months. This includes up to 10 G of bandwidth, with overages at $20 for each 1 G beyond 10 in any given month. However, during the months of November and December, the bandwidth allowance is reduced to 5G.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a conflicting bandwidth allowance for November and December (5G), directly contradicting the earlier statement guaranteeing 10G of bandwidth. This creates a clear and impactful inconsistency regarding the user's bandwidth entitlement. This follows the Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction definition, where terms are defined inconsistently in different parts of the contract.

perturbation.original_text: Personal Technical Support 24 x 7 emergency phone support and 1-business-day email response on non-critical issues. Includes a 99 percent server uptime guarantee.
perturbation.changed_text: Personal Technical Support 24 x 7 emergency phone support and 1-business-day email response on non-critical issues. The 99 percent server uptime guarantee only applies during business hours (9 AM to 5 PM PST, Monday to Friday).
perturbation.explanation: The addition of 'The 99 percent server uptime guarantee only applies during business hours (9 AM to 5 PM PST, Monday to Friday)' contradicts the initial statement implying a continuous, 24/7 uptime guarantee. This creates uncertainty as the original statement implies an always available uptime guarantee but is then conditionalized.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Included Monthly Services System Administration Management of SMTP, IMAP, DNS, SQL database and HTTP server software and systems for the AstroNutrition.com domain and web site. This includes regular off-site backups of the website itself, but the database backups are only performed quarterly. Change Management Management of site source code and integration of contributed software updates and bug fixes into zencart is included. Personal Technical Support 24 x 7 emergency phone support and 1-business-day email response on non-critical issues. The 99 percent server uptime guarantee only applies during business hours (9 AM to 5 PM PST, Monday to Friday).
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a significant contradiction. The original text implies a 24/7 uptime guarantee, while the changed text limits this guarantee to business hours. This directly conflicts with the previous, more general statement, creating an ambiguity in the level of service provided as indicated in the Perturbation Explanation: 'The addition of 'The 99 percent server uptime guarantee only applies during business hours (9 AM to 5 PM PST, Monday to Friday)' contradicts the initial statement implying a continuous, 24/7 uptime guarantee.'
